_meta.keyKnowledge: We plan, develop and resolve artworks that communicate ideas, perspectives and meaning.

_source.w: We plan, develop and resolve artworks that communicate ideas, perspectives and meaning.
y: Developing a sustained body of art that communicates complex ideas demonstrates artistic maturity.
The plan-develop-resolve process teaches us disciplined creative thinking applicable across many fields.
Effective visual communication of ideas and meaning requires both technical skill and conceptual depth.
eg: We develop a sustained body of work that investigates a complex theme or concept.
We plan our artworks through research, experimentation and concept development.
We resolve artworks that demonstrate a clear relationship between concept and execution.
We create work that communicates personal perspectives on social, cultural or environmental issues.
We demonstrate ability to sustain a creative investigation from initial concept to resolved artwork.
We present our artistic intentions alongside our resolved works.
